regions.text: Machines are now our 'work horses.' They save our muscles, but we need a 'new design for living' to find our life's direction.
Before wheels and chains, men carried water by hand. Using a cord and wheel was easier than pulling by hand.
Steps in technology come slowly. A later step was using two buckets so the empty one helps the full one come up.
often: time after time. design: a plan or 'blueprint' for a house or machine. (Illustrations show the evolution of water lifting).
